login.title: Log In
login.reset2faRequestDescription: Enter your credentials. We'll send a verification code to your email.
login.reset2faVerifyDescription: Enter the verification code sent to your email.
login.captchaFallbackQuestion: Cannot see the image? Enter the answer to this question instead: {{question}}
login.backupCodeHint: You can also enter a backup code.
login.lostAuthenticatorTitle: Email reset requires SMTP to be configured on the server
login.twoFaRemovedSuccess: 2FA removed. You can now log in.

register.title: Create Account

consent.termsCheckboxAriaLabel: Accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
consent.termsText: I accept the <termsLink>Terms of Service</termsLink> and have read the <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.
consent.healthText: I explicitly consent to the processing of the health data I enter (such as weight, body metrics, weight goals, and nutrition intake) so Schautrack can provide its tracking and planning features (Art. 9(2)(a) GDPR). I can withdraw this consent at any time by deleting the data or my account.

register.captchaFallbackQuestion: Cannot see the image? Enter the answer to this question instead: {{question}}

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.captchaFallbackQuestion: Cannot see the image? Enter the answer to this question instead: {{question}}

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.passwordUpdatedSuccess: Password updated. You can now log in.

verifyEmail.title: Verify Email
verifyEmail.description: Enter the verification code sent to your email.
verifyEmail.newCodeSent: New code sent to your email.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: This will permanently delete your account and all data. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.confirmCheckboxLabel: I understand this is permanent and irreversible.

login.invalid_state: Login failed: invalid state. Please try again.
login.exchange_failed: Could not complete sign-in with your provider.
login.no_id_token: Sign-in provider returned no ID token.
login.verification_failed: Could not verify the sign-in token.
login.invalid_nonce: Login failed: invalid nonce. Please try again.
login.registration_disabled: Registration is currently disabled. Ask an admin for an invite.
login.no_email: Your sign-in provider did not return an email address.
login.internal: Something went wrong. Please try again.
login.create_failed: Could not create your account. Please try again.
login.link_failed: Could not link your sign-in provider. Please try again.
